title: メイショウドトウ登場！

text_block_list.text:
I've joined Meisho Doto, a timid, clumsy
Umamusume, to take on the Twinkle Series.

Her goal is to shine with confidence, just like her
peer, T.M. Opera O.

While she enjoys the support of her friend,
Matikanefukukitaru, she's criticized by her
roommate, Air Shakur, for lacking sufficient stats.

Regardless, her refusal to give up is her biggest
strength. Holding onto hope, Meisho Doto begins
her racing journey.
